title: Submit a booking request successfully
description: A guest can complete the booking form with valid details and see a booking confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a valid customer name
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Book a barber appointment from the homepage
description: Verifies that a guest can complete the homepage booking flow and see a confirmation after submitting valid booking details.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with Test Customer
Fill in the contact field with a valid customer contact value
Fill a valid date into the date field
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Sign in to the protected admin area from a protected route
description: An unauthenticated user can sign in with valid admin credentials from a protected route and access the admin shell.

steps.description: Fill in the login form with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin shell is displayed

title: Log out from the admin shell
description: An authenticated admin can sign out from the admin shell and return to the unauthenticated state.

steps.description: Verify the admin access flow is displayed

title: Return to an unauthenticated state after logging out
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can log out from the shell and no longer access protected admin content afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify access to the protected admin shell is blocked

title: Register a new admin and enter the admin shell
description: A new admin registrant can complete registration and land in the protected admin area.

steps.description: Fill in the registration form with valid admin details
Verify the admin shell is displayed

title: Return to the admin access flow after signing out
description: After logging out, an admin cannot stay on protected routes and is kept in the unauthenticated access flow when revisiting admin pages.

steps.description: Verify the admin access flow is displayed

title: Access the admin dashboard after signing in
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can open the protected admin shell and reach the dashboard content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard shell is displayed

title: Register a new admin and reach the protected shell
description: Verifies that a new admin registrant can complete registration and enter the protected admin area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a valid new admin email
Fill in the password field with a valid new admin password
Verify the protected admin shell is displayed

title: Block unauthenticated access to protected admin routes
description: An unauthenticated user visiting a protected admin route is redirected to the admin access flow instead of the admin shell.

steps.description: Verify the admin access flow is displayed

title: Move through admin bookings clients and hours pages
description: An authenticated admin can use the sidebar to navigate between bookings, clients, and hours while the active section changes correctly.

steps.description: Click the bookings section in the admin navigation
Verify the bookings management page is displayed
Click the clients section in the admin navigation
Verify the clients management page is displayed
Click the hours section in the admin navigation
Verify the hours management page is displayed

title: Open bookings from the admin shell
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can navigate from the dashboard shell to the bookings management section and see its content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the bookings section in the sidebar
Verify bookings management content is displayed

title: Open clients from the admin shell
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can navigate from the dashboard shell to the clients management section and see its content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the clients section in the sidebar
Verify clients management content is displayed

title: Browse the homepage hero and services
description: A guest can view the homepage brand presentation and services content while scrolling the landing page.

steps.description: Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify the services content is displayed

title: Open working hours from the admin shell
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can navigate from the dashboard shell to the working hours management section and see its content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the working hours section in the sidebar
Verify working hours management content is displayed

title: Keep the sidebar state in sync while switching admin sections
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin sees the active sidebar state update as they move between admin sections.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the bookings section in the sidebar
Click the clients section in the sidebar
Click the working hours section in the sidebar
Verify the active navigation state reflects the current section

title: Browse the public landing page and reach the booking form
description: Verifies that a guest can read the landing page sections and open the booking form on the homepage.

steps.description: Verify the hero and booking-related content are displayed

title: Show booking validation for missing required details
description: A guest who submits the booking form with required details missing sees validation feedback instead of a booking confirmation.

steps.description: Verify booking validation errors are visible

title: See booking availability before submitting a request
description: Verifies that a guest can select booking details on the homepage and see available appointment options reflected in the booking flow.

steps.description: Fill a valid date into the date field
Verify available appointment options are displayed

title: Open footer social links from the homepage
description: A guest can reach the footer and open the available social link entry points from the public landing page.

steps.description: Verify the social link destination is displayed

title: Install the app and launch the installed experience
description: Verifies that a guest can install the PWA from the homepage and relaunch it as an installed app.

steps.description: Wait for the browser install prompt to appear
Install the app from the browser prompt
Verify the installed app experience is displayed

title: Navigate the homepage booking section and appointments content
description: A guest can move from the landing page into the booking and appointments area to view the booking entry point and scheduling content.

steps.description: Verify the booking section is displayed
Verify the appointments content is displayed

title: Show booking validation for invalid input
description: A guest who enters an invalid booking value sees validation feedback for the incorrect input before the form can be submitted successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a valid customer name
Fill in the phone field with an invalid phone number
Verify an input validation error is visible

title: Show booking field validation before submission
description: Verifies that a guest sees validation errors when required booking fields are left empty or invalid on the homepage form.

steps.description: Submit the booking form without entering required details
Verify booking validation errors are displayed

title: Open the offline fallback after the app is cached
description: Verifies that a guest can open the app after caching and see the offline fallback experience when the browser is offline.

steps.description: Wait for the app assets to be cached
Verify the offline fallback experience is displayed
